subject: Numbers, numbers everywhere
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:

| | I've got a few numbers to tell you about Peter. $26 -- our average online contribution. $260 -- **the average contribution to multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci's campaign.** Renacci's campaign isn't counting on support from a grassroots movement. They don't count on everyday Ohioans chipping in $5 here and $10 there to fight for what they believe in. They count on special interest, big money donors. **We run things differently on our team.** Sherrod fights like hell for us and our families, so we all do what we can to fight for him. These numbers bear that out. If we keep on hitting fundraising goals, we can win. [**Let's not miss this goal, either. name: =?utf-8?Q?Debbie=E2=80=99s_iPad?=
subject: Help fight for our values
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | I've gotten where I am today by following a simple philosophy: out-work, out-organize, out-run. That's how I won my first campaign -- I had five opponents, people said it couldn't be done. I walked every neighborhood in the district. I walked so much my husband Steve, worried about all the weight I lost, handed me a milkshake every morning. By Election Day, I'd knocked on 25,000 doors -- and I won. It doesn't take million-dollar checks to win an election. It takes dedication. Each contribution, even just $5, makes all the difference. Our July deadline is closing in, and with five opponents, it is absolutely critical we reach it. [**I 'm asking you to give whatever you can today -- even if that is just $5 or $10. **](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f06/622b7b5b/1bd969bb/307b9c86/890831236/VEsH/ "https://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/securelink") [**https://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/securelink**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f06/622b7b5b/1bd969bb/307b9c86/890831236/VEsE/ "https://www.debbiewassermanschultz.com/securelink") If we stay focused, we'll win. Thank you. Debbie Sent from my iPad

name: McDaniel for Senate
subject: On the Trail with Chris: Contract with Mississippi & Judge Kavanaugh
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Friends of Chris McDaniel
body:
This week, I announced my Contract with Mississippi, a detailed list of fourteen point so the voters of Mississippi can have a record to hold me accountable. Everything from budget reforms, taxes, protecting the 2nd Amendment, immigration, education, and so much more -- the people of Mississippi will be able to see exactly where I stands on the issues they care about most. Peter, This week, I announced my Contract with Mississippi, a detailed list of fourteen point so the voters of Mississippi can have a record to hold me accountable. Everything from budget reforms, taxes, protecting the 2nd Amendment, immigration, education, and so much more -- the people of Mississippi will be able to see exactly where I stands on the issues they care about most. We’ve seen for too long politicians who promise one thing but then do another when they get to Washington. These are the policies I believe will make Mississippi freer, safer, and more prosperous. You can read my entire Contract with Mississippi by clicking here. [https://mcdaniel2018.com/mcdaniel-contract-mississippi/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180713_NL&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180713_NL] - Chris On The Trail SARDIS Chris enjoyed speaking at Burns BBQ in Sardis. Thanks to Sid Burns for hosting us! --------------- COLDWATER Chris was in Coldwater at the Red Barn Cafe meeting and speaking with some great supporters! --------------- SENATOBIA We had a great time talking with some good folks at Coleman’s BBQ and Penny’s Pantry in Senatobia on Friday. --------------- GREENWOOD Chris spoke to a great group of people in Greenwood on Thursday! Thanks to Mr. Johnny and Mrs. Robby Nichols for having us! --------------- RAYMOND Chris enjoyed visiting with some good Christian folks at the annual Camp Meeting for the Mississippi District for the United Pentecostal Church on Tuesday. ICYMI Chris McDaniel Statement on President Trump’s nomination of Judge Brett Kavanaugh Judge Kavanaugh has a long record of conservative decisions ranging from the separation of powers and executive privilege to abortion, immigration and gun rights.... President Trump should be commended for another excellent nominee. Read the full statement by clicking here. [https://mcdaniel2018.com/statement-u-s-senate-candidate-chris-mcdaniel-president-trumps-nomination-brett-kavanaugh-united-states-supreme-court/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180713_NL&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180713_NL] --------------- McDaniel Contract with Mississippi The widening gap between campaign promises and a legislative record is at the heart of voters’ justifiable cynicism about politicians and the governments they oversee. That is why Chris is willing to put forth a detailed contract so that Mississippi voters can hold him accountable. Read the full article by clicking here. [https://mcdaniel2018.com/mcdaniel-contract-mississippi/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180713_NL&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180713_NL] With President Trump’s nomination of Judge Kavanaugh, we need strong conservatives in the Senate who will vote to confirm him. Chris is that conservative, but he can’t confirm Kavanaugh without your support. Please chip in and show your support for getting Judge Kavanaugh confirmed! [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180713_NL&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180713_NL] Chip in $10 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180713_NL&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180713_NL] Chip in $25 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180713_NL&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180713_NL] Chip in $50 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180713_NL&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180713_NL] Chip in $100 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180713_NL&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180713_NL] Thank you! Team McDaniel DONATE [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180713_NL&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180713_NL] [https://twitter.com/CMForUSSenate]

body:
Hi,

I wanted to make sure you saw this: President Trump held a rally in Duluth last month and announced that he's going to be targeting Minnesota in the 2018 elections.

**If Minnesota wasn 't already "ground zero" in November's elections (as CNN reported), it sure is now.**

We need to show the President that we won't let him have the last word. name: Martin Heinrich
subject: what I've been working on
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | This email has a lot of information about what I've been working on, but I hope you will take a moment to read it.

**_[I need your support for my re-election campaign, and I want to make sure you understand why and how I'm working to earn it.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-sunday-deadline-alert?amount=29&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+I+need+your+support+for+my+reelection+ca&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180715_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180715_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180715_1_1")_**

* * *

Nearly every day, we face news about President Trump's scandals, his lies, and the political catastrophes created by his administration. But that shouldn't detract from the progress that is being made despite his chaos.

In May, the Senate passed a resolution to save net neutrality. I can't overstate how big a victory this is for Democrats. Many said our bill wouldn't go anywhere, but it did. We showed the Senate can still come together and address the issues that matter to millions of Americans, consumers, and small businesses.

We are also making progress on my bill to protect Native American items and artifacts. The Safeguard Tribal Objects of Patrimony (STOP) Act passed unanimously out of its first Senate committee. I introduced this bill after meeting with local students who are pushing for greater protections for tribal artifacts, and I'm proud we've cleared the first hurdle to passing this bill.

And while the Trump administration makes moves to shrink our public lands, I am looking to protect them. I introduced legislation to shield the Chaco Canyon area - a sacred places to all New Mexicans - from drilling. Protecting Chaco from further development will ensure we don't lose its priceless history.

Some of these updates don't warrant a breaking news alert on your phone, but they are making a difference in people's lives. I came to the Senate to represent New Mexicans and our values, and we are making progress that will help people across our state and country.

**_[That is why I am asking for your support today. I am in my first Senate re-election race this year, and all this hard work and more will be undone if one of my extreme right-wing opponents defeats me this November. "" Nearly every day, we face news about President Trump's scandals, his lies, and the political catastrophes created by his administration. But that shouldn't detract from the progress that is being made despite his chaos. In May, the Senate passed a resolution to save net neutrality. I can't overstate how big a victory this is for Democrats. Many said our bill wouldn't go anywhere, but it did. We showed the Senate can still come together and address the issues that matter to millions of Americans, consumers, and small businesses. We are also making progress on my bill to protect Native American items and artifacts. The Safeguard Tribal Objects of Patrimony (STOP) Act passed unanimously out of its first Senate committee. I introduced this bill after meeting with local students who are pushing for greater protections for tribal artifacts, and I'm proud we've cleared the first hurdle to passing this bill. And while the Trump administration makes moves to shrink our public lands, I am looking to protect them. I introduced legislation to shield the Chaco Canyon area - a sacred places to all New Mexicans - from drilling. Protecting Chaco from further development will ensure we don't lose its priceless history. Some of these updates don't warrant a breaking news alert on your phone, but they are making a difference in people's lives. I came to the Senate to represent New Mexicans and our values, and we are making progress that will help people across our state and country. name: Jay Inslee
subject: Barbarous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Trump is using children to come across as tough. Add your name now.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd789da/2f5ea88d/77899b0c/2cbc0c39/892079996/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/reunite-families-now?utm_source=ema_2018-07-13_reunite-families&source=ema_2018-07-13_reunite-families&utm_campaign=reunite-families&utm_medium=ema") | _"It has been a diabolical scheme. The President [is] playing chess, you know, he's...been willing to sacrifice a few pawns, which are these children, in his effort to look as tough as he wants to be."_

\-- Governor Jay Inslee, CNN, July 9, 2018 | [REUNITE FAMILIES NOW!](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd789da/2f5ea88d/77899b0c/2cbc0c39/892079996/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/reunite-families-now?utm_source=ema_2018-07-13_reunite-families&source=ema_2018-07-13_reunite-families&utm_campaign=reunite-families&utm_medium=ema")
---
Friend,
President Trump is playing a cruel political game of chess with the lives of children separated from their parents at the border.
_Thousands of children are still being kept apart from their families._ By dragging his feet to prevent children and their families from being quickly reunited, the president is using these children to prop up his fragile ego and look tough on immigration.
It's been a barbarous process from the get go. The Trump administration's callous indifference to the plight of the thousands of children placed in detention centers around the country, far removed from mothers and fathers, is outrageous.
But while millions of concerned Americans and the international community are pressing for action, Donald Trump's only interest is coming across as hard-headed.
[**We can't let this go, friend. As Donald Trump tries to distract us from his diabolical scheme, we must raise our voices now more than ever. Demand the Trump administration reunite families now. Add your name here.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd789da/2f5ea88d/77899b0c/2cbc0c39/892079996/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/reunite-families-now?utm_source=ema_2018-07-13_reunite-families&source=ema_2018-07-13_reunite-families&utm_campaign=reunite-families&utm_medium=ema")
As governor, I'm demanding answers from Health and Human Services and Homeland Security about the children in custody.
The response to my requests? Practically radio silence. _It's clear the Trump administration has no idea what it's doing._ They have no working system in place to bring families back together. Instead, the federal agency cop out is claiming placing detained children in foster homes is _equivalent_ to reuniting them with their parents. Can you imagine if you were the parent of one of these children?
It's shameful. It's cruel. And it's unacceptable.
[**Friend, we cannot allow this travesty of human decency to continue. Demand the Trump administration reunite families now. Sign on here.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd789da/2f5ea88d/77899b0c/2cbc0c39/892079996/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/reunite-families-now?utm_source=ema_2018-07-13_reunite-families&source=ema_2018-07-13_reunite-families&utm_campaign=reunite-families&utm_medium=ema")
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[REUNITE FAMILIES NOW!](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd789da/2f5ea88d/77899b0c/2cbc0c39/892079996/VEsD/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/reunite-families-now?utm_source=ema_2018-07-13_reunite-families&source=ema_2018-07-13_reunite-families&utm_campaign=reunite-families&utm_medium=ema")

Hi there,

There is a new organization dedicated to electing Democrats in Pennsylvania that share our common beliefs. Alliance for American Values will be backing candidates that are committed to protecting values Americans hold dear, including fighting for our democracy and the rule of law and standing up for working people in this country to ensure they get a fair shake and can get ahead.

AAV will focus its efforts on Pennsylvania Congressional races because the Commonwealth has become a focal point of the Democratic effort to retake the House of Representatives thanks to a court-ordered redraw of the map.

I will not be involved in the operations of this organization, but I decided to contribute the bulk of my leftover campaign funds to the Alliance for American Values because our freedom and the future of our democracy are in the balance right now. **A Democratic majority in Congress is crucial to providing a real check and balance and to****restore**** the basic promise of America -- if you work hard, you get ahead.** I did not want significant funds sitting in my campaign account when they could make a difference in this most important moment.

**[Will you join me in contributing to the Alliance for American Values and their effort to elect Democrats who share our values?](https://act.myngp.com/el/8VXyYijwGNz3ppvoRE4GiQ==/kU3HxdvjNCZpcxqtL0C9Eg==?refcode=20180715mcginty&amount=10)**

| | Friends,

Exciting news for our campaign: Vice President Mike Pence has joined President Trump in endorsing me in the Republican primary runoff on Tuesday! I’m so grateful to have his support as we fight together to get our conservative agenda accomplished for you.

In addition to sending out a tweet on Friday, the Vice President recorded an endorsement message going out to Republican voters all over our district saying:

"I served with Martha in Congress, and I know her to be a strong conservative voice for Alabama. Martha is a reliable partner in our work to advance the Trump Administration's priorities, and we can always count on her vote to get our conservative agenda across the finish line. That's why we need Martha Roby in Congress for two more years. Don't forget to get out to the polls on July 17th and vote for Martha Roby."

I’m honored to have the backing of the White House in this campaign, and I hope you'll make sure to get out and vote this upcoming Tuesday. I would so appreciate your support!

Listen to Vice President Pence's message to voters [here](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=116A137A9A3800).

\- Martha

name: Akilah Ensley, Andrew Gillum for Governor
subject: Help us tell our story
body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37fd/9e00690/59415a99/2402ce75/2373513291/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180714_weekly_fnd_gq_act__AK_ettx&source=em18_180714_weekly_fnd_gq_act__AK_ettx")
Friends,

Barely six weeks.

That's all that stands between us and electing a true progressive to represent hard-working Floridians in the primary election. But if we want to win in every corner of the state on August 28, we need everyone rolling up their sleeves and working together.

The next few weeks are critical to this campaign. **[Can we count on you to chip-in weekly for the next six weeks until the primary election?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37fd/9e00690/59415a99/2402ce77/2373513291/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-july-weekly-donation?gpsid=13_55_1981&refcode=em18_180714_weekly_fnd_gq_act__AK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180714_weekly_fnd_gq_act__AK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=3+-+Can+we+count+on+you+to+chipin+weekly+for")**

[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37fd/9e00690/59415a99/2402ce76/2373513291/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-july-weekly-donation?gpsid=13_55_1981&refcode=em18_180714_weekly_fnd_gq_act__AK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180714_weekly_fnd_gq_act__AK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=4")
---

Here's the deal, friends. We already know that Republicans are trying to stop our bold, progressive agenda like affordable healthcare as a right for all of us and better funded public schools -- both of which Andrew will push for when he's Governor. These are the issues that matter most to Floridians and we're fighting hard to make sure these plans can become a reality for the people of our state.

We're running a campaign of the people, by the people, and for the people, and if enough of us are willing to work together, this people-powered campaign will bring us to victory -- both on August 28 and in the general election. **[So please, chip in $6 or more every week until the primary election.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37fd/9e00690/59415a99/2402ce09/2373513291/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-july-weekly-donation?gpsid=13_55_1981&refcode=em18_180714_weekly_fnd_gq_act__AK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180714_weekly_fnd_gq_act__AK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=5+-+So+please+chip+in+6+or+more+every+week+u")**

Thank you,

Akilah Ensley
Finance Director
Andrew Gillum for Governor

[DONATE WEEKLY](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37fd/9e00690/59415a99/2402ce08/2373513291/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ag-july-weekly-donation?gpsid=13_55_1981&refcode=em18_180714_weekly_fnd_gq_act__AK_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180714_weekly_fnd_gq_act__AK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=6+-+DONATE+WEEKLY")

Friends,
I am coming to you now and asking for your first contribution because this is a pivotal time and we have to stay on track towards our July goal.
**We 're still falling short of where we need to be -- and there is just too much at stake to leave anything to chance. **A radical right-wing Supreme Court nominee, attacks on health care reform, and a culture of corruption from the Trump administration that has to be stopped.
And as the _Star Tribune_ said, control of the Senate and the ability to stop Trump's agenda are on the line with our victory or defeat.
**[That's why I'm asking one more time before our deadline hits at midnight: will you rush a contribution so we can hit our $15,000 grassroots goal and have the resources to win this race? I value not just how much you give, but every contribution that donors like you make to this campaign. We are running this campaign on people power, and you are the most important part of that.
Thank you for chipping in what you can,
Tina
**Tina Smith is a fierce progressive running for U.S. Senate in a special election in Minnesota. That 's why Senate Republicans and Donald Trump have made her one of their top targets.
